attributes.action: Force supermarkets to donate in-date and non-expired food to local charities.
attributes.additional_details: The food waste is a scandal. Similar laws have already been enacted abroad.
attributes.background: Make it an offence for supermarkets to throw away in-date, non-expired and consumable foodstuffs (including drinks). Make it compulsory to donate such items to charities local to each supermarket branch.

rejection.details:
Ban supermarkets from throwing away or destroying unsold safe food 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754118
